mapper.sql: id, draft_id, command_type, idempotency_key, operator_name, remark, command_status, target_published_version, snapshot_id, error_message, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into content_publish_command ( draft_id, command_type, idempotency_key, operator_name, remark, command_status, target_published_version, snapshot_id, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{draftId}, #{commandType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, #{commandStatus}, #{targetPublishedVersion}, #{snapshotId}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update content_publish_command set operator_name = #{operatorName}, remark = #{remark}, command_status = #{commandStatus}, target_published_version = #{targetPublishedVersion}, snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from content_publish_command where draft_id = #{draftId} order by created_at desc, id desc
